option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import com.gluonhq.charm.glisten.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.text.*?>
<AnchorPane fx:id="add_orderScene" minWidth="-Infinity" prefHeight="387.0" prefWidth="731.0" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="Project.add_orderController"> <children> <TextField alignment="CENTER" layoutX="117.0" layoutY="-2.0" prefHeight="43.0" prefWidth="249.0" text="Information"/> <Button fx:id="main_menuButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#sceneChange_mainMenu" prefHeight="43.0" prefWidth="100.0" text="Main Menu"> <font> <Font size="14.0" /> </font> </Button> <Text layoutX="158.0" layoutY="274.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="City :" /> <Text layoutX="94.0" layoutY="317.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Delivery Hours :" /> <Text layoutX="66.0" layoutY="363.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Loading Dock Capability :" /> <Text layoutX="154.0" layoutY="229.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="State :" /> <Text layoutX="159.0" layoutY="183.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Zip :" /> <Text layoutX="93.0" layoutY="139.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Street Address :" /> <Text layoutX="85.0" layoutY="94.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Customer Name :" wrappingWidth="111.58203125" /> <TextField fx:id="customer_nameField" layoutX="204.0" layoutY="76.0" /> <TextField fx:id="delivery_hoursField" layoutX="203.0" layoutY="298.0" /> <TextField fx:id="city_field" layoutX="203.0" layoutY="257.0" /> <TextField fx:id="state_field" layoutX="203.0" layoutY="211.0" /> <TextField fx:id="zip_field" layoutX="203.0" layoutY="166.0" /> <TextField fx:id="street_addressField" layoutX="203.0" layoutY="122.0" /> <CheckBox fx:id="loading_yesCapability" layoutX="253.0" layoutY="345.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#compatibilityChecker" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="68.0" text="Yes" /> <Button fx:id="submit_listButton" layoutX="531.0" layoutY="329.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#sceneChange_submit" prefHeight="43.0" prefWidth="127.0" text="Submit"> <font> <Font size="18.0" /> </font> </Button> <TextField alignment="CENTER" layoutX="419.0" prefHeight="43.0" prefWidth="307.0" text="Add Order"> <font> <Font size="30.0" /> </font> </TextField> <Button fx:id="show_listButton" layoutX="531.0" layoutY="249.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#sceneChange_list" prefHeight="43.0" prefWidth="127.0" text="Show List"> <font> <Font size="18.0" /> </font> </Button> <AutoCompleteTextField fx:id="autofill_productID" layoutX="455.0" layoutY="69.0" prefHeight="27.0" prefWidth="235.0" /> <Text layoutX="455.0" layoutY="56.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Product ID" /> <AutoCompleteTextField fx:id="autofill_subName" layoutX="455.0" layoutY="109.0" prefHeight="27.0" prefWidth="235.0" /> <Text layoutX="455.0" layoutY="206.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Quantity"> <font> <Font size="18.0" /> </font> </Text> <TextField fx:id="quantity_textField" layoutX="536.0" layoutY="186.0" prefHeight="25.0" prefWidth="117.0" /> <Button fx:id="adding_listButton" layoutX="656.0" layoutY="178.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#setAdding_listButton" prefHeight="31.0" prefWidth="68.0" text="Add"> <font> <Font size="18.0" /> </font> </Button> <Text layoutX="517.0" layoutY="80.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Product Sub Name" /> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?-- removed Gluon AutoComplete import to use plain TextField instead --> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.text.*?>
<AnchorPane fx:id="add_orderScene" minWidth="-Infinity" prefHeight="387.0" prefWidth="731.0" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="Project.add_orderController"> <children> <TextField alignment="CENTER" layoutX="117.0" layoutY="-2.0" prefHeight="43.0" prefWidth="249.0" text="Information"/> <Button fx:id="main_menuButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#sceneChange_mainMenu" prefHeight="43.0" prefWidth="100.0" text="Main Menu"> <font> <Font size="14.0" /> </font> </Button> <Text layoutX="158.0" layoutY="274.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="City :" /> <Text layoutX="94.0" layoutY="317.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Delivery Hours :" /> <Text layoutX="66.0" layoutY="363.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Loading Dock Capability :" /> <Text layoutX="154.0" layoutY="229.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="State :" /> <Text layoutX="159.0" layoutY="183.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Zip :" /> <Text layoutX="93.0" layoutY="139.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Street Address :" /> <Text layoutX="85.0" layoutY="94.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Customer Name :" wrappingWidth="111.58203125" /> <TextField fx:id="customer_nameField" layoutX="204.0" layoutY="76.0" /> <TextField fx:id="delivery_hoursField" layoutX="203.0" layoutY="298.0" /> <TextField fx:id="city_field" layoutX="203.0" layoutY="257.0" /> <TextField fx:id="state_field" layoutX="203.0" layoutY="211.0" /> <TextField fx:id="zip_field" layoutX="203.0" layoutY="166.0" /> <TextField fx:id="street_addressField" layoutX="203.0" layoutY="122.0" /> <CheckBox fx:id="loading_yesCapability" layoutX="253.0" layoutY="345.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#compatibilityChecker" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="68.0" text="Yes" /> <Button fx:id="submit_listButton" layoutX="531.0" layoutY="329.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#sceneChange_submit" prefHeight="43.0" prefWidth="127.0" text="Submit"> <font> <Font size="18.0" /> </font> </Button> <TextField alignment="CENTER" layoutX="419.0" prefHeight="43.0" prefWidth="307.0" text="Add Order"> <font> <Font size="30.0" /> </font> </TextField> <Button fx:id="show_listButton" layoutX="531.0" layoutY="249.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#sceneChange_list" prefHeight="43.0" prefWidth="127.0" text="Show List"> <font> <Font size="18.0" /> </font> </Button> <TextField fx:id="autofill_productID" layoutX="455.0" layoutY="69.0" prefHeight="27.0" prefWidth="235.0" /> <Text layoutX="455.0" layoutY="56.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Product ID" /> <TextField fx:id="autofill_subName" layoutX="455.0" layoutY="109.0" prefHeight="27.0" prefWidth="235.0" /> <Text layoutX="455.0" layoutY="206.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Quantity"> <font> <Font size="18.0" /> </font> </Text> <TextField fx:id="quantity_textField" layoutX="536.0" layoutY="186.0" prefHeight="25.0" prefWidth="117.0" /> <Button fx:id="adding_listButton" layoutX="656.0" layoutY="178.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#setAdding_listButton" prefHeight="31.0" prefWidth="68.0" text="Add"> <font> <Font size="18.0" /> </font> </Button> <Text layoutX="517.0" layoutY="80.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Product Sub Name" /> </children> </AnchorPane>
